items.title: VAR review: Why Man United's Martinez was always getting red card for hair pull
items.summary: Explaining why Manchester United's Lisandro Martinez was sent off Monday for pulling Leeds United striker Dominic Calvert-Lewin's hair.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: 'You don't pick a team on price tags' - Finch wants KKR to look beyond Green
items.summary: "Some of their tactics were very questionable," Aaron Finch says of KKR's muddled planning, which led to a slowdown after the powerplay and Cameron Green batting at No. 6
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Liverpool's lost season as good as over, UCL elimination vs. PSG underlines questions that remain unanswered
items.summary: The Reds could not come back against PSG and are set to enter the summer with many of the same questions
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
